headline.primary_headline: RELIEVE PAIN THROUGH ENTIRE BODY FAST
headline.subheadline: Scientific advancement combines top 3 pain relieving technologies in 1 therapeutic device
headline.promise_compression: One device using 3 proven technologies relieves pain throughout entire body

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: How can one device relieve pain throughout the entire body?
curiosity_architecture.resolution_promise: Reflexology connects feet to all organs - treating feet treats whole body

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Pain relief requires drugs or separate treatments for each area
schema_analysis.new_schema: Feet contain reflex points to entire body - one device treats everything
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: Reflexology anatomy chart + infrared heat penetration + massage therapy combination

headline.vsl_adaptation: What if I told you there's a device that relieves pain throughout your ENTIRE body - head, back, organs, and more - all by treating just your feet? Here's the science behind it...

lead.opening_verbatim: You can now soothe tired, aching feet while getting rid of pain throughout your entire body at the same time. Combining the most amazing pain relieving technologies: Infrared Heat and Massage Therapy with the ancient pain relieving principle of Reflexology, the phenomenal new foot massager known as THE FOOT CHOICE is now being authorized for release to the general public.
lead.transition_to_body: THE FOOT CHOICE is one of the first devices of its kind to combine Infrared Heat, Massage Therapy and Reflexology together in one soothing, therapeutic foot massager.

mechanism.mechanism_description: The device combines three pain-relieving technologies: (1) Reflexology - feet contain reflex points that mirror and correspond to every organ and gland in the body, (2) Infrared Heat - penetrates deep into tissues to increase blood flow and reduce inflammation, (3) Massage Therapy - 200+ acupressure nodes with 4 power settings stimulate reflex points. When combined, treating feet treats the entire body.
technology_components: Infrared Heat - Deep penetrating warmth for acute and chronic pain
Reflexology - Stimulates reflex points corresponding to body organs
Massage Therapy - 200+ acupressure nodes, 4 power settings

proof_elements.verbatim: The Reflexology Association of America describes Reflexology as... 'the systematic, manual stimulation of the reflex maps located on the feet, hands and outer ears that resemble a shape of the human body.'
With over 200 acupressure nodes and a choice of 4 different power settings
sessions with a reflexologist can cost hundreds of dollars. But with THE FOOT CHOICE you just place your feet on top and it does everything for you
Having tried THE FOOT CHOICE myself, I can tell you... 'It is pretty amazing!'

key_sections.content_verbatim: All the nerves throughout your entire body terminate into the soles of your feet. So when you massage your feet, you help soothe discomfort in all other areas of your body.
The reflex points in your feet mirror and correspond to specific areas of your body. The various organs and glands of your body are stimulated to work to their capacity.

We put all three of the most beneficial, therapeutic technologies ever discovered together so you can enjoy the ultimate in healing, massage and therapy all at once... in one great machine... at one time... for your entire body.

narrative_flow.visual_element: Reflexology foot map showing all organs connected to foot points
narrative_flow.interviewee: Mr. John Whitakre, Executive Director, Bio Tech Research

offer.limit: Strict limit of 3 at discount price
offer.guarantee: 90-day satisfaction guarantee - full refund, no questions asked
